channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Waymo robotaxis now available in 10 cities
item.description: Data: Waymo ; Map: Jacque Schrag/Axios Waymo is accelerating its rollout of robotaxis in the U.S., adding four new cities in Texas and Florida this we...

item.title: Trump vows a lengthy SOTU speech. These are the records
item.description: Data: The American Presidency Project ; Chart: Axios Visuals President Trump holds the crown for longest address to Congress on record at 100 minutes ...

item.title: House Democrats warned against "unforced errors" at Trump's State of the Union
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-N.Y.) is making one final push to shut down any flashy displays of protest inside the chamber during Presiden...

item.title: Charles Kushner is the latest ambassador stirring trouble. Here's a list.
item.description: France has moved to cut off Charles Kushner , the U.S. ambassador and the father of President Trump's son-in-law, from meeting government officials af...

item.title: Hegseth gives Anthropic CEO until Friday to back down in AI safeguards fight
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth gave Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei until Friday evening to give the military unfettered access to its AI model or face har...

item.title: Judiciary says courthouses are crumbling nationwide, seeks control over properties
item.description: The Administrative Office of the U.S. Courts says deteriorating conditions have led to safety hazards and health issues.

item.title: We asked 2,300 Americans about the best and worst things Trump has done. Here’s what they said.
item.description: Immigration was the most divisive issue, with supporters calling it Trump’s best action and critics deeming it his worst.

item.title: The Epstein files have brought a wave of resignations and investigations
item.description: A number of prominent figures have stepped down or are facing investigations after their communications with Jeffrey Epstein and his former longtime c...

item.title: GOP lawmaker quietly questioned ‘disturbing’ East Wing demolition
item.description: Rep. Michael Turner, co-chair of the congressional Historic Preservation Caucus, wrote to a top White House aide about his “substantial concerns.”

item.title: U.S. men’s hockey team to be at State of the Union ‘somehow, some way’
item.description: Accommodations are being made for the gold medalists, House Speaker Mike Johnson said Tuesday, a day after the equally successful women’s team decline...

item.title: ‘I’ve won affordability’: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
item.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s old district to defend his economic record.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
